title: TaskFlow — Kanban Board App
description: A drag-and-drop task management board built with React and Context API. Supports multiple boards, due dates, and local persistence.

title: WeatherNow
description: A responsive weather dashboard that fetches live forecasts using a public weather API, with search history and unit toggling.

title: DevNotes
description: A markdown-based note-taking app for developers with syntax-highlighted code blocks and tag-based organization.

title: PixelDash — Analytics Dashboard
description: An interactive analytics dashboard with charts, filters, and CSV export, built using Recharts and a mock data layer.

title: ChatSphere
description: A real-time chat application with rooms, typing indicators, and message history, powered by WebSockets.

title: FocusPilot
description: A productivity dashboard combining a Pomodoro timer, goal tracker, and theme switcher with persistent local storage.

title: ShopLite — Mini E-commerce
description: A lightweight storefront with cart management, product filtering, and checkout simulation using mock APIs.

title: QuickQuiz
description: A timed quiz application with score tracking, multiple categories, and animated transitions between questions.

title: CodeSnap
description: A code snippet organizer with syntax highlighting, search, and shareable links, built as a full-stack MERN app.

title: TrailMap
description: An interactive hiking-trail explorer with map markers, elevation charts, and saved favorite routes.

title: BudgetBuddy
description: A personal finance tracker with expense categorization, monthly summaries, and interactive spending charts.

title: SnapGallery
description: A masonry-style photo gallery with lazy loading, lightbox preview, and category filters using a public image API.

title: RecipeRadar
description: A recipe discovery app with ingredient-based search, saved favorites, and step-by-step cooking mode.

title: PixelPaint
description: A browser-based pixel art editor with a customizable color palette, undo/redo history, and PNG export.

title: LinguaLeap
description: A flashcard-based language learning app with spaced repetition scheduling and progress streak tracking.
